macro.title: TitleEase accelerates growth as franchise model gains traction
macro.what: Unlike traditional joint ventures, TitleEase structures its model so franchise owners establish and own their own title company.

housing.title: Student loan plan phase-out could tighten mortgage affordability

housing.title: Zillow says MRED, Compass used MLS rules to pressure its listing standards

housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.
